name: normiculus-reminder-dispatcher
description: Background reminder dispatcher for WhatsApp using wacli and Firebase Realtime Database (read-only).

scripts.start:bg: sh -c 'mkdir -p .runtime; if [ -f .runtime/service.pid ]; then pid=$(cat .runtime/service.pid); if kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Already running with PID $pid"; exit 1; else echo "Removing stale PID file ($pid)"; rm -f .runtime/service.pid; fi; fi; nohup node src/index.js >> .runtime/service.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; echo "$pid" > .runtime/service.pid; echo "Started with PID $pid"'
scripts.stop:bg: sh -c 'if [ -f .runtime/service.pid ]; then pid=$(cat .runtime/service.pid); if kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then kill "$pid" && echo "Stopped PID $pid"; else echo "Process $pid not running (stale PID file)"; fi; rm -f .runtime/service.pid; else echo "No PID file found"; fi'
scripts.status:bg: sh -c 'if [ -f .runtime/service.pid ]; then pid=$(cat .runtime/service.pid); if kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Running with PID $pid"; else echo "Not running (stale PID file for PID $pid)"; fi; else echo "Not running"; fi'
